title: Spinach Spanakopita Recipe
description: A traditional Greek savory pastry filled with spinach and feta cheese, perfect for a satisfying lunch or dinner.
instructions: Thaw the spinach package according to the package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil over medium heat.
Add the pungent garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the thawed spinach to the skillet and cook until wilted.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked spinach mixture and crumbled feta cheese.
Open the spanakopita package and carefully unfold the pastry to create a flat sheet.
Spoon the spinach and feta mixture onto one half of the pastry, leaving a 1/2-inch border around the edges.
Fold the other half of the pastry over the filling and press the edges to seal.
Brush the top of the pastry with the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil.
Place the spanakopita on a baking sheet and bake for 25-30 minutes until golden brown.
Let the spanakopita rest for 5-10 minutes before slicing and serving.
